0010111111101001100000 - ASI: 14

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  11 = 1 * 1
  000 = 0 * 00
  001 = 0 * 01
  100 = 1 * 00
  111 = 1 * 11
  00101 = 001 * 01
  01001 = 01 * 001
  100000 = 100 * 000
  111111 = 111 * 111
  00101111111 = 00101 * 111111
  01001100000 = 01001 * 100000
  0010111111101001100000 = 00101111111 * 01001100000
